## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (tests added for new behavior)
- [ ] New license classifications cite an SPDX source
- [ ] New rules have a stable id and an actionable `fix` message
- [ ] No new network calls; nothing is uploaded
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Regenerated `examples/sample-*` if output changed
